title: taraxacum lupatiferum
intro: Taraxacum lupatiferum, also known as the upright dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum lupatiferum include its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to support liver and kidney function, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues. Taraxacum lupatiferum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
